info.title: DTOMaker CLI
info.description: CLI tool for converting DTOMaker templates to generators.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --source
options.description: The source template file to consume

options.name: --output
options.description: The output generator file to produce

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The output namespace of the generator [default: Generated]

options.name: --language
options.description: The target language file extension [default: cs]
